heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 21308 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2027.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14043h–7 of Title 42
Amendments2022— substituted “2023 through 2027” for “2015 through 2019”.Pub. L. 117–103
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “2023 through 2027” for “2015 through 2019”.Pub. L. 117–103
